api_contracts.method: GET /{'id': 'behavior_3', 'name': 'groupsubscriptionmanagement', 'description': "getgroupsforsubscription: returns groups with 'is subscribed' flag per std receiver. filters by groupids if provided (subscription module restricted to specific groups). updategroupsforsubscription: batch update of multiple group access states (bool) via tuple<groupid, bool> list.", 'trigger': 'subscription module ui / self-service portal', 'source_file': 'servicealert.services/standardreceivers/istandardreceiverservice.cs'}

blazor_pages.component: {'id': 'behavior_1', 'name': 'CreateStandardReceiver', 'description': 'Creates a StandardReceiver with Name, Email, JobTitle, OtherInfo, Phone/PhoneCode (resolved via ToPhoneNumberValue by countryId). If AvailableToAllProfilesOfCustomer=true: adds receiver to ALL customer profiles automatically.', 'trigger': 'Admin creates a new standard receiver in UI', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/StandardReceivers/StandardReceiverService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_3', 'name': 'GroupSubscriptionManagement', 'description': "GetGroupsForSubscription: returns groups with 'is subscribed' flag per std receiver. Filters by groupIds if provided (subscription module restricted to specific groups). UpdateGroupsForSubscription: batch update of multiple group access states (bool) via Tuple<groupId, bool> list.", 'trigger': 'Subscription module UI / self-service portal', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/StandardReceivers/IStandardReceiverService.cs'}

rules: AddStandardReceiver* / Remove* methods return string (error message or null) not bool.
AvailableToAllProfilesOfCustomer: if true on creation, receiver is added to ALL profiles of customer at creation time.
DeleteGroup deleteMembers=false by default — must explicitly pass true to remove orphaned members.
InboundMessageEventListener uses PhoneNumberTools.PhoneGetParts with '+' prefix on receiver number and DanishCountryId as default.
KeywordRegistrator is injected into StandardReceiverService — keyword registration triggered on receiver create/update.
OverruleBlocked=true: inbound distribution messages bypass blocked status on receiver.
SCIM group lookup is by name + customerId (not by external ID alone).
TestMode=false always for distribution sends — live sends only.
if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.
